rules: Use Bohemia Interactive Arma 2 OA scripting docs; avoid Arma 3 assumptions.
Gameplay mission edits belong in the Chernarus source mission.
Run Tools/LoadoutManager dotnet run after mission edits to propagate generated missions.
Treat missing 7za as packaging-only unless deployment packaging is required.
Use WF_Debug-gated detailed logs and small always-on INFORMATION/WARNING logs for tester-visible state transitions.

systems.networking: PVF lists in Common/Init/Init_PublicVariables.sqf plus direct publicVariable channels for supply, anti-stack, day/night, FPS, AFK and markers.
systems.economy: Funds and side supply with town SV, commander income, resources FSM and supply missions.
systems.ai: Server town AI, AI commanders, client/headless delegation, player AI watchdog/recovery.
systems.ui: Rsc resources, Client/GUI menus, RHUD/FPS HUD, map marker loops.
systems.tooling: LoadoutManager for mission generation/packaging; PerformanceAuditAnalyzer for RPT metrics.
systems.integrations: DiscordBot, a2waspwarfare_Extension, A2WaspDatabase extension, BattlEye publicVariable filter.

knownRisks: Autonomous AI supply logistics is a config-gated landmine: UpdateSupplyTruck compile is commented at Server/Init/Init_Server.sqf:36 but the live call at :383 (gated by WFBE_C_ECONOMY_SUPPLY_SYSTEM==0 && AI_COMMANDER_ENABLED>0) spawns a nil; Server/FSM/supplytruck.fsm is also missing. Default SUPPLY_SYSTEM=1 is safe; Supply System 0 + AI commander errors at runtime.
DoNotUse CRV7PG loadout classes can crash the game if used in loadouts.
AntiStack database extension calls are live-server sensitive.
Generated missions can be overwritten by LoadoutManager.

version.sqf is generated per terrain by LoadoutManager and absent from raw source; description.ext/initJIPCompatible.sqf include it, so a fresh checkout is not directly loadable until generation/deploy supplies it.
PublicVariable traffic and client marker/UI loops are performance-sensitive.

PV dispatch trust boundary (DR-1): Server_HandlePVF.sqf/Client_HandlePVF.sqf Call Compile the sender-chosen command string with no validation; BattlEyeFilter/publicvariable.txt only has the kickAFK feature rule. Harden via command-set validation + a real BE PV filter before trusting on a public server.

Economy authority class (DR-6/14/16/22/23/27/28/41): construction, buying, selling, upgrades/supply transfer, ICBM, gear/EASA/service and attack-wave paths are client-authoritative or trust client-supplied requests. A server ledger redesign must cover both PVF and direct publicVariableServer surfaces.

Attack wave direct-PV gap (DR-41): Common_AttackWaveActivate.sqf sends client-supplied [_supply, _side] through ATTACK_WAVE_INIT; Server_AttackWave.sqf derives ATTACK_WAVE_PRICE_MODIFIER from that payload.

Discord bot deserialization risk (DR-31): DiscordBot/src/ExtensionData/GameData/GameData.cs reads database.json every 60s with Newtonsoft TypeNameHandling.All in the token-holding bot process; prefer TypeNameHandling.None or a narrow binder.
Client post-join waits (DR-37): Init_Client.sqf has timeout-less waits for replicated wfbe_* side-logic/namespace values, so a missing producer can silently hang JIP clients.

Paratrooper drop markers (DR-2) and MASH tent markers (DR-3) are confirmed dead: receivers unregistered (HandleParatrooperMarkerCreation not in client PVF list; receiverMASHmarker.sqf only referenced by commented Init_Client.sqf:132).

Generated-mission drift (DR-4): Chernarus<->Takistan differ only by LoadoutManager skip-list/blacklist (no accidental drift), but skip-listed files (mission.sqm, GUI_Menu_Help, StartVeh, Core_Artillery, Server/Config, Textures, loadScreen, texHeaders) never propagate and must be hand-mirrored. Modded_Missions/* are abandoned (modded propagation commented at SqfFileGenerator.cs:132).
Headless disconnect behavior (DR-21): delegated HC-created AI migrates to the server on disconnect, but this mission removes the HC from the candidate pool without re-delegating that load.

Headless static-defence delegation (DR-42) is fire-and-forget today: Client_DelegateAIStaticDefence.sqf creates units on the HC but the update-delegation-static_defence send-back is commented, so the server does not track those HC-created static-defence units.

currentPR.title: feat: supply helicopters for both teams
currentPR.deferred: Autonomous AI-flown supply helicopters until AI supply logistics is restored/redesigned.
reviewRisks: Repeated supply vehicle reloads must not stack duplicate Killed event handlers.
PR #1 behavior is pending until merged.

keyFindings: AI supply-truck call Init_Server.sqf:383 is live but config-gated; errors under WFBE_C_ECONOMY_SUPPLY_SYSTEM==0.
PR #1 stacks Killed event handlers on reused supply vehicles (bounded EH leak; no double-pay).
PR #1 cash run diverts value from side supply to commander team funds by design.
DR-1 PV dispatch Call Compile trust boundary unmitigated (no validation + no BE filter).
DR-2 paratrooper drop markers dead (receiver unregistered).
DR-3 MASH tent markers dead (client receiver only in commented Init_Client.sqf:132).
DR-4 Chernarus<->Takistan in sync except skip-list; Modded_Missions abandoned.
DR-5 atlas preprocessFile counts recount to 678/465/213; FSM count of 3 verified accurate.

reviewPasses.type: handoff integration into first-stop topic pages
keyFindings: PVF hardening and direct publicVariableServer hardening are separate surfaces.
Economy authority class now includes ICBM, gear/EASA/service and attack-wave paths.
Discord bot database.json reader uses TypeNameHandling.All while the extension writer uses TypeNameHandling.None.
Init_Client.sqf still has timeout-less post-join waits on replicated wfbe_* state.
MASH networking wording now reflects DR-34 dead-both-ends state.
Gameplay atlas no longer treats Server_AssignNewCommander call-shape as open; DR-15 confirms it as a bug.
AI page now preserves DR-21 correction: HC disconnect migrates units to server but no re-delegation happens.
